## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's engagement with Webflow to improve developer awareness and documentation strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Colin, new to Webflow, is taking over the dev platform and seeking clarity on GrowthX's role and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Current developer documentation structure is disorganized and needs improvement](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [GrowthX's scope includes content creation and strategy, but specifics need refinement](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Need for a cohesive SEO and content distribution strategy, potentially including LLM optimization](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Engagement Scope

  - [Initially focused on tactical content creation (e.g., integration pages)](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Expanded to include strategy for increasing developer awareness](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Potential to advise on site structure and content organization](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Not currently including link building, but may offer strategic guidance](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1897.0)

### Current Documentation Challenges

  - [Developer subdomain lacks intuitive structure](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Integrations pages are orphaned and not well-linked](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Multiple silos of information (developers vs. agencies)](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [Unclear target audience for documentation](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)

### Content Strategy Discussion

  - [Need for a more comprehensive approach beyond just integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Consideration of pillar content strategy for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
  - [Importance of creating a logical content hierarchy (e.g., guides, recipes, implementation assistance)](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [Balancing immediate content creation with long-term structural improvements](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)

### SEO and Distribution Strategy

  - [Importance of good content and distribution for visibility](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [Consideration of AI/LLM optimization (e.g., Perplexity, ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
  - [Potential focus on organic mentions and natural backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [Need to involve Vivian (Webflow's SEO owner) in strategy discussions](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)

### Webflow's Developer Platform Evolution

  - [Platform team created \~2 years ago, now in scaling phase](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [Shift from focusing solely on app developers to broader audience](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [Opportunity to differentiate Webflow in competitive landscape](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule meeting with Colin, Jason, and Vivian to discuss overall strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare high-level site structure recommendation](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [Colin to internally align teams on need for strategic clarity](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1989.0)
  - [Continue content creation in parallel with strategy discussions](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Explore potential for expanding GrowthX's role in link building and distribution strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zWLvriN5KN-3oMtArRKfrepB2wZVZjzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)
